predicate.title: D13: knowledge content is repo-scoped; mechanism is spec-owned
predicate.problem: After the knowledge-first migration the owner asked whether the knowledge architecture should be populated into asdlc-verify or kept single-sourced; the answer and its reasoning existed only in a conversation, which the knowledge base exists to prevent.
acceptance_criteria: Decision D13 exists as a linked knowledge node and renders in docs/design/decisions.md
Priority-0 follow-ups name asdlc-verify README generation via a pinned spec tag
